name: Arias the Labrynth Butler
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>白銀の城の執事</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ラビュリンス・バトラー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> アリアス
desc: During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand or field to the GY; Special Summon 1 "Labrynth" monster, or Set 1 Normal Trap, from your hand. The Set Normal Trap can be activated this turn. When your opponent activates a card or effect in response to your card or effect activation of a Normal Trap or a "Labrynth" card, except "Arias the Labrynth Butler" (Quick Effect): You can activate this effect in the GY; Special Summon this card. You can only use each effect of "Arias the Labrynth Butler" once per turn.
mnst_eff: During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand or field to the GY; Special Summon 1 "Labrynth" monster, or Set 1 Normal Trap, from your hand. The Set Normal Trap can be activated this turn. When your opponent activates a card or effect in response to your card or effect activation of a Normal Trap or a "Labrynth" card, except "Arias the Labrynth Butler" (Quick Effect): You can activate this effect in the GY; Special Summon this card. You can only use each effect of "Arias the Labrynth Butler" once per turn.
eff: During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand or field to the GY; Special Summon 1 "Labrynth" monster, or Set 1 Normal Trap, from your hand. action: Sends itself from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Allows activation of Trap Cards the turn they were Set
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
